headlines.title: Parents told under-5s should not be on screens more than an hour a day
headlines.description: New government guidance also suggests children under-two should not be watching screens alone.

headlines.title: Three charts that are warning signs flashing for Trump on Iran war
headlines.description: As gas prices rise, Trump's approval rating is heading into politically dangerous territory.

headlines.title: Officials to ask Mandelson to hand over personal phone messages for release
headlines.description: Officials are set to publish more documents related to his appointment as UK ambassador to the US - but have so far only had access to the peer's work phone.

headlines.title: Just Eat and Autotrader among firms investigated in fake reviews probe
headlines.description: The UK's competition watchdog says it is looking at five firms in its investigation into misleading online reviews.

headlines.title: How Russia's threat forced Germany to radically rethink its military
headlines.description: Germany once terrorised Europe, but now Europe is welcoming a resurgent German military.

headlines.title: Olivia Dean's streak continues as she wins big at Mobo Awards
headlines.description: The pop star secured three of the biggest awards of the night as the show celebrated its 30th anniversary.

headlines.title: Sarah Ferguson's 'close Epstein ties' scrutinised in US lawmaker's letter
headlines.description: The letter, seen by the BBC, also called on Ferguson to share any knowledge about Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's links to Epstein.

headlines.title: Two hereditary peers allowed to keep ceremonial roles
headlines.description: The Duke of Norfolk and Lord Carrington won the concession due to their role in organising state occasions.

headlines.title: Whale swims off sandbank after big German rescue effort on Baltic coast
headlines.description: Rescue teams now hope the whale will swim out of the shallow waters of Lübeck Bay and into the wider sea.

headlines.title: Temperatures to reach 17C as warm spring sunshine returns
headlines.description: Warm air from the Azores is set to move into the UK next week. Temperatures could reach 17C on Tuesday. But not before more unsettled weather first as Simon King explains.

headlines.title: Beyond oil: The crucial exports blocked by Hormuz closure
headlines.description: The price of a wide range of goods - from food, to smartphones, to medicines - could be affected by the US-Israel war with Iran.

headlines.title: Panic buying prompts PM to reassure Australians over fuel supply
headlines.description: Anthony Albanese says nation's supply remains "secure" amid reports of panic buying and shortages.

headlines.title: Zelensky visits Saudi Arabia after offering Ukraine's drone expertise
headlines.description: There is renewed urgency for Ukraine to get a drone deal done, as the US increasingly focuses on Iran.

headlines.title: Why the Strait of Hormuz matters so much in the Iran war
headlines.description: Iran says it will "set fire" to ships trying to sail through the world's most vital oil transit point.

headlines.title: Mum took own life after a forced adoption - now I want an apology
headlines.description: Thousands of unmarried English women were forced in give their babies away in 1950s, 60s and 70s.

headlines.title: Raye comes out swinging on her new album, This Music May Contain Hope
headlines.description: The star suffered writer's block while working on her second album, but it hits all the right notes.

headlines.title: The Papers:  'Trump extends Hormuz deadline' and 'One hour of screen a day'
headlines.description: Donald Trump giving Iran 10 days to re-open a vital shipping channel and new advice on screen time for under 5s is a focus for Friday's front pages.

headlines.title: Pokemon collection worth £100,000 -  are people amassing small fortunes?
headlines.description: As the value soars, more and more people are stashing away cards in the hope of making a profit.

headlines.title: Don't panic - five ways to stop your kids' endless scrolling
headlines.description: Parenting experts share their tips on how to keep children's screen time under control.

headlines.title: Weekly quiz: What sneaky snack was this bird of prey seen carrying?
headlines.description: How much attention did you pay to what happened in the world over the past seven days?

headlines.title: Oscars moving to a new home outside Hollywood
headlines.description: The centrally located Peacock Theater in Los Angeles will host the 101st Academy Awards ceremony when it begins streaming on YouTube in 2029.

headlines.title: 'Housebound' benefit cheat caught ziplining in Mexico
headlines.description: Catherine Wieland defrauded more than £23,000 in benefits, saying she was too ill to go outside.

headlines.title: Two Cuba-bound aid ships missing after leaving Mexico
headlines.description: Mexico's navy launches a rescue mission for ships delivering aid to Cuba, strained by food and fuel shortages amid a US embargo.

headlines.title: Our daughter battled Meningitis B despite being vaccinated in 'very rare' case
headlines.description: After she became critically ill, the four-year-old spent two weeks fighting for her life.

headlines.title: Trump's signature to appear on US dollars in first for sitting president
headlines.description: The US president's signature will appear on new paper currency alongside Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.

headlines.title: Champion of MasterChef: The Professionals revealed
headlines.description: The winner of the BBC One show beat 31 fellow contestants to take home the crown.

headlines.title: Judge rejects Pentagon's attempt to 'cripple' AI firm Anthropic
headlines.description: A federal judge told the government it could not immediately enforce a ban on Anthropic’s tools.

headlines.title: My son will never be the same again after sexual abuse by a friend
headlines.description: In the past two years at least 186 young people have been referred to health trusts here after exhibiting harmful sexualised behaviours.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: The US-Iran Briefing Wars
headlines.description: Are the US and Iran peace talks going anywhere?

headlines.title: Will Trump succeed in changing the US voting system?
headlines.description: And why have ICE agents been deployed to US airports?

headlines.title: Ruth Jones as the late Carry On actress Hattie Jacques
headlines.description: How actress Hattie Jacques's home life was blown apart by a secret sexual liaison.

headlines.title: Bellamy rues chaos against Bosnia as Wales' World Cup dream ends
headlines.description: Head coach Craig Bellamy rues the chaos of Wales' World Cup play-off semi-final loss to Bosnia-Herzegovina - but says his team have a bright future.

headlines.title: Piastri sets pace ahead of Mercedes in Japan
headlines.description: McLaren's Oscar Piastri sets the pace in second practice at the Japanese Grand Prix ahead of the Mercedes of Kimi Antonelli and George Russell.

headlines.title: What next for Northern Ireland as World Cup wait continues?
headlines.description: Manager Michael O'Neill says he is positive for the future despite a World Cup play-off defeat by Italy in Bergamo, and questions about his own long-term plans.

headlines.title: Littler takes out 170 twice to beat Van Gerwen
headlines.description: Luke Littler produces form close to his sensational best to overpower Michael van Gerwen and win his third Premier League night of the season in Berlin.

headlines.title: Could England's set-pieces win them the World Cup?
headlines.description: Former England goalkeeper Paul Robinson says set-piece expertise could give Thomas Tuchel's side an X-factor this summer.

headlines.title: Wales lose on penalties as World Cup dream ended by Bosnia-Herzegovina
headlines.description: Wales' hopes of reaching the 2026 World Cup are ended by Bosnia-Herzegovina in Cardiff as the away side score a late equaliser before winning on penalties in their play-off semi-final.
